findings.title: SQL injection risk
findings.runtime_scope_justification: src/api/users.py handles HTTP requests on the public API.
findings.failure_mode_justification: Unvalidated user input passed directly to SQL query.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: Code path visible from handler to raw SQL.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Traced from API handler at users.py:10 to raw SQL at users.py:23.
findings.issue: User input flows into a raw SQL string.
